div.h1: DP Table: Best Plan Per Subset
div.p: Dynamic Programming for Join Order Optimization
Optimal Substructure: The best plan for {A,B,C} must use the best plans for its constituent subsets. If dp[{A,C}] could be improved, we'd use that improvement in dp[{A,B,C}] too.
Speedup at 15 tables: ~40 million times faster!
